class.name: kalman_arc/RscpPublisher
class.description: Build and publish framed RSCP request protobuf messages.

qtgui.label: RSCP Publisher
qtgui.statustip: Publish RSCP request frames to rscp/serial/rx.

class.name: kalman_arc/RscpOverTCP
class.description: Build RSCP request protobuf messages and publish COBS-framed bytes for the TCP bridge.

qtgui.label: RSCP Over TCP
qtgui.statustip: Publish and receive COBS-framed RSCP protobuf bytes over rscp/serial topics.
